scenarios.notes: San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers contest 12 and specs 24/25/26 passed pre-game status, identity, allowlist, odds, and lead-time gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1 with PR #146 approval self-heal and own-state safety coverage, installed SDK v0.9.0, typecheck/test/build, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public balances/allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned six quote-ready rows across contests 11 and 12; dry run stayed target-scoped.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict allowlist [11,12], including contest 12, seedSpeculations=false.
A controlled taker filled the MM moneyline quote on Los Angeles Dodgers. The final score made Los Angeles Dodgers/home/lower the winning side, so this controlled live-fill position was claimed.
Telemetry captured the controlled fills with source own-state-stream and no unknown-own-fill/divergence safety event.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A scratch-state dry-run/cold-start probe loaded state cleanly, expired copied stale records, and did not create duplicate live exposure.
Official final score San Diego Padres 0, Los Angeles Dodgers 3 was verified and contest 12 scored via R5/CRE. Operator watchdog caveat documented separately.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations for contest 12 settled to the expected lower winning sides where applicable.
Winning controlled positions were claimed, losing positions were no-op/not claimable, and final target positions are zero. One immediate post-claim read lagged; the next verification read was zero.
Tiny canary risk plus protocol fees stayed within the approved $10 hard cap; recorded lifecycle transactions are summarized.
